textByHash.37f8e09a6829fe6dd35c63f12d40b9c372555480: Well look who it is. Damien Leucurte! I thought you didn't like to associate with our lot.
textByHash.320eefb83066c16f40655f9e7b855718112c4218: Scared of getting mud on his pretty clothes, I bet.
textByHash.4e7de351c4e5acda79fb8108126c97faaaaeac1f: Your threats mean nothing out here Damien. There're no Drakans around to protect you.
textByHash.5e18624b349a9ea07797327079a330c701d3f44d: Not that Drakan protection means much these days anyway. His own brother killed by a human. How does he respond? He stays hiding in his fancy castle.
textByHash.d19b0e1f6c1b80f24123696a825fdeae03f97a03: Ha! You think this one would get Drakan protection even if he were about? I hear Vanstrom has found out about this little side venture. Little Damien has been a very naughty boy.
textByHash.e0a38bf7e4eb99edf255481409fb497bff720cd4: A nice family of three, out for a little picnic a bit too close to the Salve.
textByHash.1fc3f93e3149cd96fc20b60833ad266599f7f38e: Well if you want more, you're welcome to cross the Salve yourself and get them.
textByHash.405b875ff1d95a29dbf34b86950553ae78a50490: You assume there's going to be a next time. I bet you don't last another week now that the Myreque are running around with vampyre-killing weapons.
textByHash.c109037aa78c9ad397287acf9cada2716474dfb4: A week? He won't even last another day at the rate he's going!
textByHash.dc4688513cb04d595fb08bbb77010548771553e1: Yes, we are. See you around Damien.
textByHash.d913f9119eba7c7292562ea7f343ba339ff708c8: There's nothing good to drink here.
textByHash.a440ca9e35c3a5d7811b7ca2cda33439ccf80409: Blood's only good if there's meat to go with it.
textByHash.e1ec5a41372311f471505a868c5ea3b6d25f735e: My business is none of your business. Go poke your nose somewhere else.
textByHash.c308e8ddaf820240581ffe77e817951e72f506cb: Don't disturb me. I need to guard the tithes.
textByHash.f7e90e1e9bf131d1ad8201edf18c9ac2faeffd04: Escape? I'm not here to stop them escaping. I'm here to stop them getting stolen.
textByHash.614c23fdbb5ba9324cb2927391aabec2a267e88a: Now take your stupid questions somewhere else. I have a job to do.
textByHash.f25a407d90f967465c63b5e32f3a31c8b9c174c8: You shouldn't be here, slave. Go back to your master before you get yourself killed.
